programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep504: Paddling the Swedish-Norwegian Borderlands
programme.desc: Host Heather Herbeck explores the Swedish-Norwegian Borderlands region near Värmland, Sweden on her stand-up paddleboard and competes in a 55K kayak race.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep112: Aquabike World Championship Series
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Olbia, Sardinia, for the Grand Prix of Italy, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep105: Yap
programme.desc: This remote Pacific island is a diver’s paradise and we take advantage of this by diving with giant Manta Rays the size of a small plane. The craziest dive though is when Bill feeds dozens of sharks with no protective gear. We also film where no one has filmed before…The Forbidden Island.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep111: Sand Tiger Sharks as Protectors
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV demonstrates how Sand Tiger Sharks act as protectors and takes a Deeper Dive by explaining male vs female shark differences, shark reproduction, Gray Reef Sharks and shark buoyancy.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep315: Cliff Diving, Wing Foiling and Sailing
programme.desc: World of Watersports explores the dangerous sport of Cliff Diving and profiles Gary Hunt - one of the very best cliff divers on the planet. In addition, WOW features wing foiling in Switzerland and Bacardi Cup Sailing in Bermuda.

programme.title: Blue World Ep606: The Amazing Comeback of Gray Seals + Shark Performances in the Philippines
programme.desc: Gray seals look like cute swimming puppy dogs, and their story of recovery from the brink of extinction is one of history's best examples of conservation. Then we travel to the town of Oslob in the Philippines, where the locals have switched from hunting Whale Sharks to teaching them to perform for tourists.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. programme.title: Hot Water Ep112: Aquabike World Championship Series

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 01
programme.desc: Kimmy Fasani is a world class athlete, a loving mother, a natural leader, and a true champion of women in professional snowboarding. In Episode 1 of her Microdose series, we learn where Fasani’s glorious story begins. Featuring Shannon Dunn, Donna Carpenter, Hana Beaman, Gabe Taylor and Ryan Runke.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we learn how Kimmy Fasani stepped away from the contest scene and into backcountry snowboarding with help from shred legend Devun Walsh and innovator Iikka Backstrom. Featuring Chris Benchetler, Devun Walsh, Adam Moran, Bryan Knox and Peter Morning.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 03
programme.desc: As a Burton athlete, Kimmy Fasani has long been a champion of change in women's snowboarding. Innovative products. Fair pay. Better contracts. Sick ripping. Watch and be uplifted. Featuring Hana Beaman, Pat Bridges, Danny Davis, Gabe Taylor, Kevin Pearce, Bryan Knox, Adam Moran and Peter Morning.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: FEI Equestrian World - Episode 4

We will also meet some of the sport's top athletes who have their sights on lifting the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup trophy and catch up on all the vaulting action from the finals in Saumur, France.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Episode 5 - Nations Cup Victoria Trophy
programme.desc: The equestrian instalations of Dehesa Montenmedio celebrate the Nations Cup. This means all riders are eager to perform their best to reach the top in the Spanish facilities. Watch the best moments of the 2021 competition.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: Machine works Augsburg Nuremberg, Incorporated. MAN, for short. The enterprise has existed for more than 250 years and is among the leading European manufacturers of commercial vehicles, engines and machines.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: Conrad Dietrich Magirus is considered a pioneer of fire-fighting technology. Even today, the most modern fire engines are built by hand in Ulm. We take a look at the 150-year history of the company and the production of these vehicles.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: Mattighofen in Austria is the birthplace and production site of KTM. Under the motto "Ready to Race", the motorbike manufacturer produces vehicles that could compete 100 percent in any race right out of the factory.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: Go Green!
programme.desc: Citroen's C-Zero is the brand's first foray into electric mobility. Also: Mercedes-Benz sent three of their hydrogen-powered F-Cell models around the world. And: the Volvo V60 plug-in, an electric car, hybrid model and turbo diesel at the same time.

programme.title: Go Green!

programme.title: 4x4

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The S version of the Jaguar F-Pace is a tough competitor for Porsche Macan Turbo other rivals. Also: Audi launched its SQ7 as the most powerful diesel SUV on the market. And: the Bentley Bentayga, the first luxury class SUV in the world.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: MAR
programme.desc: Surfing has ceased a long time ago to be considered a niche sport. As the mainstream industry discovers its potential for selling clothes, trips and a whole set of ‘lifestyle’ products, there are those who appreciate it for what it is in its purest form – a direct connection to mother nature.We accompany Big Wave surfer Alex Botelho and some of his friends to meet surfers who balance their love for the ocean and nature with a professional career in the sport. Mar is a tale of discovery, triumph and (almost) tragedy, but above all it is a life affirming pledge to positive vibes in and out of the line-up.Get ready to soak up a new conception of the world of surf as Alex Botelho unveils concepts unknown for the mainstream audience, available on Nautical Channel.Awards:Best Feature Documentary – Best Istanbul Film Festival 2021. Official Selections 2021: Ocean Film Festival World Tour, International Ocean Film Festival.

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.desc: 100 years of celebration in 100 minutes

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E01 - Koala
programme.desc: This series is a unique look at the early life and development of young animals, edited and narrated from the viewpoint of the animal's themselves. As children explore the wonders of animal life, their natural fascination will deepen into a true love and appreciation of animals. In the first episode we meet Koala.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E02 - Gazelle
programme.desc: We gazelles live on the Savannah in Africa. Mummy said, that the Savannah is a very dry place. My dad has big horns so he can fight to protect us because lions want to eat us. We must be careful even by the river because crocodiles are watching. We eat mainly dry grass and if its not too dry we don’t need to drink much.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E03 - Sea Lion
programme.desc: We live in the ocean! It’s huge and wet. But mainly we live on the ocean shore. That’s where all the seal families make their home. What we love the most is swimming! Water is the greatest fun in the world. We have no problem staying in the water for hours at a time. Together with dolphins, we love to jump into the waves. Look at us go! Isn’t that awesome?

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E04 - Brumby
programme.desc: I am a wild horse who lives in Australia. We were born to run and the difference between me and a farm horse is that I can run freely where I want. I meet with my friends the donkeys and lizards at waterholes which are very precious for us. But watch out! We don’t like to be pushed around or feel threatened.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E05 - Butterfly
programme.desc: We Monarch Butterflies have to chew our way from our egg to see the world. Bite by bite together, with my brothers and sisters we start to feed on the leaves. We don’t have any parents but just know what to do. When we feel cold, hungry, or afraid, we feel the same way as you do. We travel a lot and are capable of eating much more than our own weight. Our life is definitely hard work.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E06 - Pelican
programme.desc: There are many pelicans in the world. We are Australian pelicans. But we don’t live only in Australia. We also live in other parts of the world. Pelicans like to hunt together. We hunt as a team. We swim in the water in a flock making noise with our feet and wings, that's how we drive the fish into shallows where we easily catch them. Flying is very easy for us and our nests are built from grass stems.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E07 - Elephant
programme.desc: Our home is Africa and we also have relatives in India. But this is Africa. We have many friends that live here with us. See? Gazelles, antelopes, wildebeests....all of them only eat what grows out of the ground. Elephants love to play in the water and mud. We throw the mud around, and spray the water all over our bodies. But watch out! We don’t want to meet the lions.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E08 - Tern
programme.desc: We live by the water and build our nests in the sand on the shores. We like to live all together in a flock. We terns are able to fly soooooooo long above the ocean without landing. If we don’t need to, we might not land at all. Flying is a blast! There are lots of different subspecies of tern. And we’re going to visit some of them today. We are all related. It’s kind of like being in a big family.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E09 - Ants
programme.desc: I’m a Green Tree Ant and I mainly live in the forests of Australia. We ants are incredibly strong, built for working hard and long. We must all work within the community to survive. We don’t do anything just for fun and we always think about all the other ants and what is good for us all. We have to fight together for our place in the forest and to protect the most important ant in our community which is our queen.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E10 - Sea Horse
programme.desc: In the seahorse family, it is the daddy who gives birth to us. He carry’s us in his sac, until we hatch from the eggs our mommy lay into his sac. There are various species of seahorse. That’s why we come in different sizes and shapes. Some live bound to the corals, because the marine currents are very strong. We love exploring the waters we live in.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E11 - Bear
programme.desc: We bears live a solitary life but when it comes to hunting we take it as a reunion. We love to catch and eat fish in the river where we spend a lot of our time but the forest is also our home. We have a lot of animal neighbours such as buffalos, seagulls, coyotes but we never really like to meet with wolves. Everyone is a bit different, because everyone lives differently. That’s why it is better not mingle with others and stay with your own kind.

programme.title: My Animal Friends - S01:E12 - Budgie
programme.desc: We budgies live in Australia. Here you’ll find everything that budgerigars need: open and broad plains; lakes; rivers; and mainly thousands and thousands of budgerigar friends. I don’t know, but it’s a beautiful life. I like it. Eating grass seeds and chatting with our other beautiful friends makes me happy.

programme.desc: César recalls with deep sadness the moments spent with Adriana in the restaurant kitchen when he is suddenly surprised by the presence of the girl.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila dice toda la verdad a Max y confiesa que lo ama, sin embargo, en un nuevo encuentro le pide que confíe en ella mientras trata de resolver el asunto que tanto los atormenta. Roberto, está decidido a matar a Max.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto le pide a Astrid que le consiga un trabajo en Mascarada a cambio de no hacer nada contra Max. Camila confiesa a Max que Roberto la chantajea. Luciano y el inspector interrogan a la Madre Isabel y al Padre Tiziano sobre Rosa Blanco y ellos mienten.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: El Ultimo Verano
programme.desc: Carlos es un Profesor de universidad a punto de jubilarse, pero su futuro se ve en peligro porque una de sus alumnas lo acusa de haber sido acosada. Esto es solo el inicio de la peor racha de su vida ya que Carlos descubre que su esposa lo engaña y que la vida que el creía perfecta se esfuma poco a poco de sus manos... tal vez sea el ultimo verano en la vida de Carlos

programme.title: Como El Gato y El Ratón
programme.desc: El barrio de La Estrella es uno de los más pobres de Bogotá. Allí habitan ciudadanos que han sido desplazados por la guerra y la violencia. Un día y tras años de espera, la luz eléctrica llega al barrio. La gente lo celebra y, pese a oponerse el edil, deciden usarla de manera ilegal. Todo se complicará cuando dos familias tengan un conflicto por unos cables cruzados.

programme.title: Dos Abrazos
programme.desc: Cuatro personas que se ven forzadas a defenderse ante la vida, un ensimismado chico de doce años, la cajera que tiene un encuentro con él, un airado conductor de taxi y la enajenada hija de uno de sus pasajeros, se reúnen en dos abrazos.

programme.title: El Bosque del Silencio
programme.desc: UNA MUCHACHA CONOCIO A UN HOMBRE POR INTERNET Y SE ENAMORA DE EL UN DIA DECIDIO IR A VERLO EN PERSONA, AUNQUE SU FAMILIA SE LO PROHIBIO ELLA DE CUALQUIER MANERA SE FUE PERO CUANDO LO VIO NO PODIA CREER LO QUE PASO

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
